title: Purplish GUI
description: A cute and lovely pink and purple GUI pack
body:
![purplish_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0ba178adf6ba63bc387d259e5f66ac49d21210.png)
---


This resourcepack makes every GUI in the game pink and purple




![inventory, crafting table and chest GUI picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e14df60c5f8eaecd837c31bf703ab8e32d7217ed.png)


Currently, only the English (US) language removes the GUI text

It's the first pack I've ever uploaded
I hope you'll like it ♥


If you find any issue with the pack, contact me on Discord @roxannelapin
